name: io.github.brave/brave-search-mcp-server
description: Official Brave Search MCP server exposing the Brave Search API (web, image, video, news, local, and AI summarization) to MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Brave Search API key. Obtain one at https://api-dashboard.search.brave.com/app/keys.
